title: Getting a Library Card
scene: 你去公共图书馆办借书证。

turns.cn: 您好，今天需要什么帮助？
turns.en: Hello. How can I help you today?
I'd like to get a library card.

turns.cn: 请出示身份证和地址证明。
turns.en: I'll need your ID and proof of address.
Will a utility bill work?

turns.cn: 可以，填一下这张申请表。
turns.en: Yes. Please fill out this application.
How many books can I borrow at a time?
Twenty items, for three weeks.

title: Finding a Book
scene: 你在图书馆找一本特定的书。

turns.en: Excuse me, where can I find Nineteen Eighty-Four?

turns.cn: 我查一下……小说区，索书号823。
turns.en: Let me check. Fiction section, call number 823.
Which floor is the fiction section on?
Second floor, near the windows.
If it's checked out, can I place a hold?

turns.cn: 可以，在网上或前台办理。
turns.en: Yes, online or at the front desk.
Thank you!

title: Returning Overdue Books
scene: 你还书时发现已经过期了。

turns.en: I'm returning these books.
One of them is five days overdue.
How much is the fine?

turns.cn: 每天十美分，一共五十美分。
turns.en: Ten cents per day, so fifty cents total.
Can I pay with a card?

turns.cn: 可以，逾期超过十美元才停借。
turns.en: Yes. Borrowing is blocked only if fines exceed ten dollars.
Okay. I'll return them on time from now on.

title: Using the Computer
scene: 你想用图书馆的电脑查资料。

turns.en: How do I use the public computers?

turns.cn: 用借书证登录，每次一小时。
turns.en: Log in with your library card. One hour per session.
Can I print documents?

turns.cn: 黑白每页十美分，彩色五十美分。
turns.en: Black and white is ten cents a page, color is fifty.
Is there Wi-Fi?

turns.cn: 有，密码在入门处告示牌上。
turns.en: Yes. The password is on the sign near the entrance.
Got it. Thanks!

title: Interlibrary Loan
scene: 你要的书本分馆没有，咨询馆际互借。

turns.en: Do you have this book?

turns.cn: 本分馆没有，但可以馆际互借。
turns.en: Not at this branch, but we can request it from another library.
How long does that usually take?

turns.cn: 一到两周，到了会发邮件通知。
turns.en: One to two weeks. We'll email you when it arrives.
Is there an extra fee?
It's free, but late fees still apply.
Great. Please place the request for me.
